description_long: This is a tall, freestanding wooden cabinet or shelving unit with a light natural wood finish. The structure features a main enclosed compartment at the top, with two doors on the front and a white horizontal panel extending from one side, possibly functioning as a pull-out shelf or work surface. On one side, there are three open shelves, each supported by brackets, providing additional storage or display space. The back of the unit is mostly solid, with a white panel covering the rear of the main compartment. The legs are long and open, creating a raised base that allows for clearance underneath. The overall design is modern and functional, suitable for urban environments such as sidewalks, parks, or communal spaces.
description: A tall, modern wooden cabinet with a top compartment, side shelves, and a white pull-out panel. It features a natural wood finish and open legs for clearance.
description_view_0: Side view showing the cabinet's tall profile, the white pull-out panel, and the solid wood construction.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the two cabinet doors, the white pull-out panel on the left, and three open side shelves on the right.
description_view_2: Opposite side view highlighting the three open shelves and the white pull-out panel extending from the top compartment.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the white back panel of the main compartment and the open leg structure beneath.
